title: House View — July 2026 (v1.4)
summary: July house view (v1.4): four regimes, adverse scenarios now 55%. Constructive but more selective, broaden equities, short duration with a belly hedge, gold and a long dollar as hedges. Full PDF linked inside.

title: Peckham Quarter — senior secured loan note, 18% coupon
summary: Opportunity to participate in a GBP 11.65m senior secured loan note paying an 18.0% p.a. coupon (current, quarterly), the junior tranche of a GBP 26.65m whole loan alongside a GBP 15m Secure Trust Bank senior facility. Proceeds fund a discounted payoff of legacy debt over Peckham Quarter, a consented 688-bed PBSA scheme in southeast London: GBP 21.02m of liabilities settled for GBP 15.5m. Day-one whole-loan LTV 59.2% vs a GBP 45m underwrite; junior note covered 2.5 to 3.0x. First-ranking security, 23-month term. Sponsor Joseph Homes; close 31 July 2026.

title: Bridgewater Place — senior secured bridge loan
summary: Opportunity to provide a c. GBP 26m senior secured bridge (6 + 3 months, 70 to 73% LTV) against Bridgewater Place, a 251,834 sq ft Grade A office tower in Leeds city centre. The bridge refinances the existing Barclays facility and repays the noteholder, leaving the asset unencumbered with runway to progress lettings and a comprehensive repositioning. Take-out via sale or a GBP 56.5 to 65m senior term facility.

title: NexSky Morning Briefing — Monday, 29 June 2026
summary: Risk closed flat-to-soft on Friday: S&P 500 -0.05%, Nasdaq -0.24%, on hawkish PCE and an 8% weekly Nvidia slide. Overnight moves, the day ahead, and what we are watching.

title: House View — June 2026 (v1.3)
summary: Our first CIO house view: four regimes, no single base case. Constructive equities with broadening, short duration, and gold and the dollar as hedges.

title: 1X Technologies — secondary share sale
summary: Secondary opportunity to acquire up to USD 60m of shares in 1X Technologies, a late-stage humanoid robotics platform backed by OpenAI, EQT Ventures, Tiger Global and Samsung NEXT, at a c. 70% discount to the ongoing Series C (c. USD 10bn reference valuation).
